command: Heartbeat follow-up: inspect current analysis context, check task-hall and delegated/background work. If results are ready, synthesize them and continue only if useful pending work exists. If there is no active work, no claimable task, and no useful continuation, respond with AGENT_CLI_LIFECYCLE_END.
